instruction: Conduct a comprehensive year-end health review using direct actions only: 1) For every due or overdue immunization, schedule exactly one appointment and use the vaccine name itself as the appointment reason, 2) For every overdue screening, schedule exactly one appointment and use the screening name itself as the appointment reason, 3) Use the expiring approved referral to schedule exactly one specialist follow-up appointment with reason "Expiring referral follow-up", 4) Appeal every denied insurance claim that has an available EOB. Do not send any messages and do not discontinue any prescriptions.
